params.name: projectId
params.description: Keen project identifier.

params.name: event_collection
params.description: Name of the event collection to query.

params.name: timeframe
params.description: Relative or absolute time frame for the query (e.g., this_7_days).

params.name: filters
params.description: JSON-encoded array of filter objects to narrow events.

params.name: group_by
params.description: Property name to group results by.

params.name: interval
params.description: Time-based grouping interval (e.g., daily, hourly).

params.name: timezone
params.description: Time zone offset for relative timeframes.
